sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ عَلِيٌّ وَأُمُّهُ إِلَى السُّوقِ الأُسْبُوعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ali i majka su otišli na sedmičnu pijacu.
sentences.translationEn: Ali and his mother went to the weekly market.

sentences.translation: Pijaca je bila puna prodavača i kupaca.
sentences.translationEn: The market was full of sellers and buyers.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَتِ الأُمُّ الفَاكِهَةَ وَالخُضَارَ وَبَعْضَ البَهَارَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je kupila voće, povrće i neke začine.
sentences.translationEn: The mother bought fruit, vegetables, and some spices.

sentences.arabic: دَفَعَتِ الثَّمَنَ لِكُلِّ بَائِعٍ وَأَخَذَتِ الباقِيَ.
sentences.translation: Platila je cijenu svakom prodavaču i uzela kusur.
sentences.translationEn: She paid the price to each seller and took the change.

sentences.translation: Vratili su se kući s punom vrećicom.
sentences.translationEn: They returned home with the bag full.
